cases.title: TS-11: Open Draft session without valid room GPS returns 422 RoomGpsRequired
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns a Draft session with roomLatitude and roomLongitude null
Session class-subject is within instructor ClassAssignment scope
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode RoomGpsRequired with Vietnamese message requiring room GPS configuration
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft with openedAt null
cases.expected: Draft to Active transition blocked per BR-07; session status unchanged; error surfaces RoomGpsRequired per AC-04b

cases.title: TS-13: Open Draft session with valid room GPS transitions to Active
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns a Draft session with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172
Roster enrollments exist for session class-subject pair
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 and response status Active with openedAt populated
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert Pending rows seeded for enrolled students
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current and assert valid QrToken issued
cases.expected: BR-07 satisfied: valid finite room GPS allows Draft to Active; attendance bootstrap and QR scheduler start per AC-05a

cases.title: SessionService.open rejects Draft session with null GPS in Postgres transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Draft session row exists with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open wired to SessionRepository under owning Instructor context
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) for session missing coordinates
Capture thrown domain exception with errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Query sessions table for sessionId and read status and opened_at columns
Query attendance_records for sessionId and assert zero rows exist
cases.expected: BR-07 enforced at SessionService.open Layer 4; no Active transition; no attendance bootstrap or QR scheduler side effects

cases.title: SessionService.open with valid GPS commits Active state and seeds Pending attendance
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Draft session row with room_latitude 10.762622 and room_longitude 106.660172
N enrolled students exist for session class-subject pair
SessionService.open wired to AttendanceService.initializeForSession
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) under owning Instructor context
Query sessions table and assert status Active with opened_at set
Query attendance_records for sessionId and count rows with status Pending
Assert Pending count equals N enrolled students
cases.expected: BR-07 GPS prerequisite met; single transaction transitions Draft to Active and seeds Pending attendance per validation-rules §5.2 step 5

cases.title: SessionService.open preserves Draft state when room GPS is missing
preconditions: Draft session row exists with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Record beforeState Draft from sessions table
Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) and capture RoomGpsRequired failure
Query sessions table for sessionId and read status column
cases.expected: beforeState Draft, afterState Draft; BR-07 blocks transition; openedAt remains null

cases.title: SessionService.open transitions Draft to Active when valid room GPS configured
preconditions: Draft session row with valid room_latitude and room_longitude within Earth bounds
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Record beforeState Draft from sessions table
Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId)
Query sessions table for sessionId and read status and opened_at columns
cases.expected: beforeState Draft, afterState Active; openedAt set; BR-07 activation prerequisite satisfied

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open returns 422 RoomGpsRequired when GPS missing
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Draft sessionId with null roomLatitude and roomLongitude owned by instructor
steps: Send POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response body contains errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Assert response envelope matches validation error contract per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with RoomGpsRequired errorCode per validation-rules §4 BR-07 mapping

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open returns 200 Active Session DTO when GPS valid
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Draft sessionId with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172 owned by instructor
steps: Send POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains status Active, openedAt timestamp, and unchanged roomLatitude and roomLongitude
Assert response body does not contain errorCode RoomGpsRequired
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with Active Session DTO per API design §5.4 when BR-07 GPS requirement is met

cases.title: Student denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Draft session with valid GPS exists
Student role lacks session:write permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Only instructor may trigger Draft to Active per BR-07 scope; Student cannot open sessions regardless of GPS state

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open without session:write
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Draft session with valid GPS owned by another instructor exists
Admin has session:read institution-wide but no default session:write per MVP policy
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open using TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Admin cannot activate sessions in MVP default policy; BR-07 open trigger restricted to instructor session:write scope

cases.title: SessionService.open rejects when only roomLatitude is set and roomLongitude is null
preconditions: Draft session row with room_latitude 10.762622 and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId)
Capture RoomGpsRequired domain exception
Query sessions table and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: BR-07 requires both valid latitude and longitude; partial GPS configuration blocks activation with no exceptions

cases.title: SessionService.open rejects when only roomLongitude is set and roomLatitude is null
preconditions: Draft session row with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude 106.660172
SessionService.open invoked under owning Instructor context
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId)
Capture RoomGpsRequired domain exception
Query sessions table and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: BR-07 requires both coordinates; longitude alone does not satisfy activation prerequisite

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open on Draft with out-of-bounds latitude returns 422 RoomGpsRequired
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns Draft session with roomLatitude 91 and roomLongitude 106.660172 persisted via PATCH
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 422 and errorCode RoomGpsRequired
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Latitude outside −90..90 is not valid room GPS per BR-07; activation blocked with RoomGpsRequired

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open accepts boundary coordinates latitude −90 and longitude −180
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns Draft session with roomLatitude −90 and roomLongitude −180
Roster enrollments exist for session class-subject pair
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 and response status Active
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and verify roomLatitude −90 and roomLongitude −180 persisted
cases.expected: Earth-boundary coordinates are valid finite GPS per BR-07; Draft to Active transition succeeds at inclusive limits

cases.title: Mở buổi học button disabled with inline GPS required message when coordinates missing
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Instructor navigates to Draft session detail settings tab (Cài đặt) without room GPS configured
steps: Observe Mở buổi học (open session) action button state
Verify button is disabled or blocked from submission
Verify inline error message requires room GPS configuration before opening check-in
Attempt to click open action and confirm session status badge remains Nháp (Draft)
cases.expected: Open session UI blocked per BR-07; Vietnamese inline message prompts GPS configuration; session remains Draft with no check-in window

cases.title: Instructor configures GPS via GpsMapPicker then opens session successfully
preconditions: Instructor is logged in and viewing Draft session without GPS on settings tab
GpsMapPicker fixture coordinates available (10.762622, 106.660172)
steps: Select room location on GpsMapPicker map with valid coordinates
Save session settings and verify GPS coordinates displayed on detail page
Click Mở buổi học (open session) action
Confirm open in dialog prompt if shown
Verify session status badge updates to Đang diễn ra (Active) and QR display link is enabled
cases.expected: BR-07 satisfied via UI: valid room GPS configured then activation succeeds; check-in window opens per AC-05a

cases.title: Session detail shows room GPS coordinates on map after Draft save with GpsMapPicker
preconditions: Instructor is logged in on session creation page for assigned class HESD-01
Instructor fills SessionForm and selects coordinates on GpsMapPicker
steps: Click Lưu nháp (save draft) action
Navigate to session detail page
Verify status badge shows Nháp (Draft)
Verify room latitude and longitude displayed on embedded map or coordinate readout
Verify Mở buổi học action is enabled when both coordinates are valid
cases.expected: UI reflects configured room GPS prerequisite for BR-07; instructor can proceed to open when coordinates valid

cases.title: Flow A step 3: Instructor opens Draft session after GPS configured in prior step
preconditions: Roster seeded for HESD-01 / SWE-101 via prior CSV import (Flow A step 1)
Draft session created with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172 (Flow A step 2)
Authenticated Instructor session available
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 and status Active
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current until valid token received
Proceed to student check-in as Flow A step 4 continuation
cases.expected: Flow A activation gate passes BR-07; session Active with QR issuance ready for workshop check-in

cases.title: WF-02: PATCH room GPS onto GPS-less Draft then open succeeds
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Draft session created without roomLatitude and roomLongitude
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open and assert HTTP 422 RoomGpsRequired
PATCH /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 106.660172
Assert HTTP status 200 with updated coordinates
POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open and assert HTTP 200 status Active
cases.expected: BR-07 blocks open until GPS configured; two-step WF-02 preparation completes activation after coordinates added

cases.title: Parallel SessionService.open attempts on GPS-less Draft all reject; session stays Draft
preconditions: Draft session row exists with room_latitude NULL and room_longitude NULL
SessionService.open wired to real PostgreSQL with transaction isolation
Two concurrent callers use owning Instructor context for the same sessionId
steps: Launch two parallel SessionService.open(sessionId) invocations against the GPS-less Draft session
Await both calls to settle
Assert both reject with errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Query sessions table once and assert status Draft with opened_at NULL
cases.expected: No partial Active transition under concurrent open; BR-07 enforced consistently; session remains Draft

cases.title: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open on Draft with out-of-bounds longitude returns 422 RoomGpsRequired
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor owns Draft session with roomLatitude 10.762622 and roomLongitude 181 persisted via PATCH
Instructor session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/open with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 422 and errorCode RoomGpsRequired
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId and assert status remains Draft
cases.expected: Longitude outside −180..180 is not valid room GPS per BR-07; activation blocked with no exceptions

cases.title: SessionService.open does not start QR scheduler when RoomGpsRequired guard fails
preconditions: Draft session row with null GPS in PostgreSQL
QrService scheduler hook observable in test environment
SessionService.open wired to session-management and checkin-qr modules
steps: Record QR scheduler state before open attempt
Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) and capture RoomGpsRequired failure
Assert QR scheduler was not started for sessionId
Query qr_tokens table for sessionId and assert zero rows
cases.expected: BR-07 failure prevents downstream QR issuance side effects; no tokens created while session remains Draft
